goal: 修复 supersession ranking PBT 链式排序失败

summary.title: Fix chained supersession ranking in context retrieval
summary.what: Fixed enforceSupersessionRanking so supersession chains such as A -> B -> C propagate the adjusted score from the terminal superseder down the whole chain. Added a deterministic regression test covering the chain shape that rapid found in TestPropertySupersessionRanking.
summary.why: CI full PBT found that the previous one-pass score pinning could lower B below C after A had already been pinned below B, leaving A ranked above B and violating Property 3. Retrieval must always rank a present superseder above the intent it supersedes, even across chains.
summary.user_goal: 修复 supersession ranking PBT 链式排序失败

decisions.chose: recursive adjustment from superseder to superseded
decisions.rationale: Computing a node after its superseder propagates score caps through chains, unlike the old single forward pass.
A cycle cannot satisfy strict ordering on every edge; the guard prevents infinite recursion while preserving existing scores for malformed data.

decisions.chose: add a fixed A -> B -> C test plus rerun the rapid seed
decisions.rationale: The fixed test makes the minimized failure readable; the rapid seed proves the CI-discovered property failure is addressed.

rejected.alternative: Sort directly by supersession graph after scoring
rejected.reason: More invasive and would need to define behavior across unrelated relevance ties; score adjustment is the existing design and only needed chain propagation.

rejected.alternative: Relax or delete the PBT assertion
rejected.reason: The invariant is correct: a superseded intent must not outrank its replacement when both are present.

risks: Local make quick-test still exposes an unrelated flaky TestTrace_AppendTurnsRecordedTogetherDetected; isolated reruns confirm it is separate from this supersession ranking fix.

anti_patterns.what: Weakening Property 3 so a superseded intent can rank above its present superseder
anti_patterns.why: Agents would see replaced guidance before the replacement and may repeat stale decisions.

followups: Track and fix the separate TestTrace_AppendTurnsRecordedTogetherDetected timing flake if CI starts hitting it.

architectural_claims: Context retrieval supersession ranking is graph-aware enough to propagate strict replacement ordering through supersession chains.
behavioral_changes: Superseded intents in an A -> B -> C chain are score-capped after their superseder is adjusted, so C ranks above B and B ranks above A when all are present.
